title: Custom Text Styles
script:
This video shows custom text styling options.

[Visual: beautiful mountain landscape]
You can customize the text color, size, position, and animation.

[Visual: ocean waves at sunset]
Options include fade, slide, zoom, typewriter, and pop animations.

[Visual: forest path with sunlight]
Background options: none, box, or glass effect.

[Visual: starry night sky]
Enable glow for a cinematic text effect.
